creator: dan@langille.org
text:
Andrei V. Lavreniyuk wrote:

>  > OH, and do you have any existing Bacula ports/packages on this system?
> 
> 
> # pkg_info -E bacul\*
> bacula-client-3.0.3
> bacula-docs-3.0.3
> bacula-server-3.0.3

That is the problem.  Solution: pkg_delete bacula-* first.

FYI: http://marc.info/?l=bacula-devel&m=126442920415150&w=2
